title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, 25-year-old co-founders of Corgi, raised $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy carriers. The founders emphasize pursuing the most ambitious version of an idea and argue that deep moats are built through time, energy, and relentless execution against regulatory challenges.
